extraction.description: This screenshot shows UiPath Studio Web with the Explorer panel on the left and the Main.xaml workflow for the "Get Approved Invoices" tool open in the main canvas. The workflow displays a sequence consisting of a Manual Trigger, a Query Entity Records activity, and a For each Record loop with an instruction describing how approved invoice JSON objects are added to the out_Invoices list. The left navigation shows other tool workflows in the Orchestrator Tools project.
extraction.step_instructions: Informational screenshot — no user action required. It shows the implementation of the "Get Approved Invoices" RPA workflow in Main.xaml, including the Manual Trigger, Query Entity Records step, and the loop that processes approved invoice JSON objects into out_Invoices.
